top_frustrations.title: App Crashes and Performance Issues
top_frustrations.description: Frequent app crashes and performance issues are severely impacting user experience, leading to frustration and potential churn.
supporting_evidence: i payed for premium and yet the app glitches and kicks me out and it annoys me deeply sometimes when i enter the app..its plain black with the exit button.
crashing whenever playing music with the song in full screen, opposed to the small banner window at the bottom of the screen is the only way to use the app.
top_frustrations.recommended_action: Invest in improving app stability and performance to minimize crashes and ensure a seamless user experience.

top_frustrations.title: Excessive Ad Frequency on Free Tier
top_frustrations.description: The high frequency of ads on the free tier is frustrating users, making the experience unbearable for many and driving them to consider alternative services.
supporting_evidence: EVERYTHING ASKS FOR A PREMIUM. I BOUGHT A PREMIUM... NOW I'M GETTING ADS TO BUY SOME PLATINUM PREMIUM
Best music streaming service. The ads are horrible though, I get 3-5 ads every 2 songs.
top_frustrations.recommended_action: Review ad frequency and consider introducing ad-free intervals or more engaging ad formats to reduce user frustration.

top_frustrations.title: Limited Features on Free Tier
top_frustrations.description: The limited features available on the free tier, such as the inability to choose specific songs or skip tracks, are frustrating users and pushing them towards premium or alternative services.
supporting_evidence: the free version is awful. you have to pay to get a basic, average experience.
cant even do bare minimum features such as skipping songs as much as you'd like.
top_frustrations.recommended_action: Consider introducing more features to the free tier or offering more flexible premium plans to cater to a wider range of users.

top_frustrations.title: Poor Recommendation Quality
top_frustrations.description: Users are dissatisfied with the current recommendation algorithms, finding them repetitive or not aligned with their tastes, which hampers discovery and enjoyment.
supporting_evidence: I used to love spotify, my music app of choice. Now if I want to play some music, start some playlists created by Spotify - I need to scroll through all suggested podcasts.
very bad experience far now. can't choose songs as our preference, needs subscription.
top_frustrations.recommended_action: Enhance recommendation algorithms to provide more personalized and diverse content suggestions.

top_frustrations.title: Inconsistent Offline Listening Experience
top_frustrations.description: Users are experiencing inconsistencies with offline listening, including issues with downloads, availability of content, and playback quality, which affects their overall satisfaction.
supporting_evidence: downloading of this app is very slow in low devices when wi-fi is also fast
membership cost high bcoz alot of bootleg etc versions missing hd quality bad of 70-90a song local artista missing and their concerta also
top_frustrations.recommended_action: Improve offline listening by addressing download issues, expanding available content, and ensuring consistent playback quality.

feature_requests.title: Fix App Crashes and Bugs
feature_requests.description: Users across various segments are experiencing frequent app crashes and bugs, which severely hampers their ability to enjoy the service.
supporting_evidence: my app has been crashing nonstop since the new update, it won't even stay open for my the 15 seconds at a time.
crashes every 5 seconds, will not stay running no matter what i try.
feature_requests.recommended_action: Prioritize bug fixes and stability improvements to ensure a smooth user experience.

feature_requests.title: Improve Free Tier Experience
feature_requests.description: Users are frustrated with the limited features and excessive ads on the free tier, requesting a more balanced experience without the need for a premium subscription.
supporting_evidence: too many adds bruv, i get like 6 adds in an hour but, good update. at least make nonpremium people have something better
restricting so much on free version should be a crime to make u pay for subscription.. i will be deleting this app
feature_requests.recommended_action: Introduce ad-free intervals or rewards for engaging with ads to enhance the free tier experience.

feature_requests.title: Enhance Premium Subscription Value
feature_requests.description: Premium subscribers feel that the current offerings do not justify the cost, seeking more features or better quality to match their investment.
supporting_evidence: continuing to charge more and then when adding audio books caps it to 15hrs a month, with all the price hikes giving a little something back would have been nice
best apo for music i do wish premium wasnt so expensive tho
feature_requests.recommended_action: Review and adjust premium pricing strategy, considering adding more exclusive content or features.

feature_requests.title: Improve Discovery Features
feature_requests.description: Users are looking for better ways to discover new music and podcasts, suggesting improvements to recommendation algorithms and discovery features.
supporting_evidence: now crashes when i try to search, and when i select a new album. fresh install, and cleared cache.
how is it possible that after 2 decades you don't have an option for random play from any song from the artist in my library?
feature_requests.recommended_action: Enhance discovery features by improving recommendation algorithms and introducing new ways to explore content.

feature_requests.title: Enhance Offline Listening Experience
feature_requests.description: Users, especially those in areas with poor internet connectivity, are seeking improvements to offline listening capabilities, including better download management and more content availability.
supporting_evidence: downloading of this app is very slow in low devices when wi-fi is also fast
membership cost high bcoz alot of bootleg etc versions missing hd quality bad of 70-90a song local artista missing and their concerta also
feature_requests.recommended_action: Optimize offline listening by improving download speeds, expanding available content, and enhancing download management features.

quick_wins.title: Stability and Performance Fixes
quick_wins.description: Addressing frequent app crashes and performance issues is crucial for improving user experience and reducing frustration, potentially leading to increased retention and positive word-of-mouth.
supporting_evidence: my app has been crashing nonstop since the new update, it won't even stay open for my the 15 seconds at a time.
crashes every 5 seconds, will not stay running no matter what i try.
quick_wins.recommended_action: Prioritize and implement fixes for the most common crashes and performance issues to ensure a stable app experience.

quick_wins.title: Optimize Ad Experience on Free Tier
quick_wins.description: Implementing ad-free intervals or more engaging ad formats could significantly improve user experience on the free tier, reducing frustration and increasing engagement.
supporting_evidence: too many adds bruv, i get like 6 adds in an hour but, good update. at least make nonpremium people have something better
restricting so much on free version should be a crime to make u pay for subscription.. i will be deleting this app
quick_wins.recommended_action: Introduce ad-free intervals or rewards for engaging with ads to enhance the free tier experience.

quick_wins.title: Enhance Discovery Features
quick_wins.description: Improving discovery features, such as recommendation algorithms and search functionality, could lead to a more engaging experience, encouraging users to explore more content and stay within the app.
supporting_evidence: now crashes when i try to search, and when i select a new album. fresh install, and cleared cache.
how is it possible that after 2 decades you don't have an option for random play from any song from the artist in my library?
quick_wins.recommended_action: Update recommendation algorithms and introduce new discovery features to help users find content that matches their interests.

long_term_opportunities.title: Advanced Music Discovery Platform
long_term_opportunities.description: Creating an advanced music discovery platform that incorporates AI-driven recommendations, user-generated playlists, and social features could revolutionize how users interact with music, setting a new standard in the industry.
supporting_evidence: I used to love spotify, my music app of choice. Now if I want to play some music, start some playlists created by Spotify - I need to scroll through all suggested podcasts.
very bad experience far now. can't choose songs as our preference, needs subscription.
long_term_opportunities.recommended_action: Develop a comprehensive music discovery platform that integrates advanced recommendation algorithms, social sharing, and community features.

long_term_opportunities.title: Personalized Pricing Models
long_term_opportunities.description: Developing personalized pricing models based on user behavior, preferences, and usage patterns could offer a more tailored and potentially more appealing proposition to a wider range of users.
supporting_evidence: continuing to charge more and then when adding audio books caps it to 15hrs a month, with all the price hikes giving a little something back would have been nice
best apo for music i do wish premium wasnt so expensive tho
long_term_opportunities.recommended_action: Invest in developing personalized pricing models that cater to individual user needs and preferences.

long_term_opportunities.title: Enhanced Offline Capabilities
long_term_opportunities.description: Expanding offline capabilities to include more content, improving download management, and ensuring seamless playback could significantly enhance the user experience, especially for those in areas with limited internet connectivity.
supporting_evidence: downloading of this app is very slow in low devices when wi-fi is also fast
membership cost high bcoz alot of bootleg etc versions missing hd quality bad of 70-90a song local artista missing and their concerta also
long_term_opportunities.recommended_action: Invest in enhancing offline capabilities, including expanding available content, improving download speeds, and ensuring consistent playback quality.
